first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the textual evaluations are substantively identical. Both versions highlight the same core strengths (full-stack development, open-source experience) and the same weaknesses (lack of C++ and large-scale cloud experience). The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate that the change in university had any impact on the assessment.
